title: MoEFCC – Young Professional – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: MoEFCC Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Young Professional (Technical). Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 27-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through MoEFCC official website moef.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Environmental studies, Climate Change, Development studies or related fields OR B.Tech. in Environmental Engineering or related fields.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.
seo_tags: Forest and Climate Change Young Professional (Technical) Recruitment 2026
